main.description: A player's character profile in Federated Realms. Attributes are an open map — each server defines what attributes it uses via system.attribute records.

class.description: Class ID referencing the originating server's system.class definition

race.description: Race ID referencing the originating server's system.race definition

attributes.description: Open map of attribute ID -> numeric value, e.g. { 'str': 14, 'dex': 12, 'sanity': 80 }. Attribute IDs reference system.attribute definitions.

derived.description: Cached derived stats computed from formulas, e.g. { 'maxHp': 50, 'maxMp': 30 }. Recomputed by each server using its own formulas.

homeServer.description: DID of the server where this character was created. Used to resolve class/race/attribute definitions.

extensions.description: Server-specific extension data, keyed by server DID. Preserved across transfers even if the destination server doesn't understand it.
